Brief description.

## Glossary

## Requirements

### Requirement 1: Create Items

#### Acceptance Criteria

1. [99-REQ-1.1] THE system SHALL create items.
2. [99-REQ-1.2] THE system SHALL validate items.

### Requirement 2: Delete Items

1. [99-REQ-2.1] THE system SHALL delete items.
